history.qwen_observation: Tests fail with NoClassDefFoundError for org.codehaus.groovy.vmplugin.v7.Java7 because a transitive Groovy 3.x dependency is incompatible with JDK 21, and previous recipe-based version bumps did not override it on the classpath.
history.qwen_rationale: Explicitly adding Groovy 4.0.21 and its core modules as direct dependencies via pom_patch forces Maven to use the JDK 21-compatible version, overriding any older transitive pulls from Spring Boot or other libraries that cause the VMPluginFactory initialization failure.
